sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Sun exposure, pollution, and daily buildup can leave your skin looking dull, tanned, and tired. ☀️
That’s where the Deep D-Tan Cleansing Facewash steps in—designed to refresh your skin and bring back its natural clarity.

This cleanser works to remove dirt, excess oil, and surface tan without being harsh on your skin. It helps clear away the layer of dullness that builds up over time, leaving your face feeling cleaner, fresher, and more balanced after every wash. 💧

Formulated with Cinnamon and Clove Oil 🌿, it supports deep cleansing while giving your skin a refreshed feel. Camphor Bark Oil helps purify the skin and maintain a clean look, while Globulus Leaf Oil adds a cooling, soothing touch. ❄️ Aloe Vera keeps your skin calm and hydrated, and Vitamin E supports softness and overall skin health. ✨

The texture feels light and easy to use, making it perfect for daily cleansing—especially after long hours outdoors.

With regular use, your skin starts to look clearer, less dull, and more refreshed.

It’s not just about removing tan—it’s about restoring a clean, fresh feel your skin deserves every day.

✨ Achievements

-> 4.8 rating on brand website
-> 1500+ ratings on marketplaces
-> High repeat usage (daily cleanser category)
-> “Tan removal + acne control” rare combo positioning
-> Ayurvedic D-Tan Formula (natural + active blend)

________________________________________________________________________________________________

NOTE:- People with sensitive skin are advised to perform a patch test. If a rash, redness, or itching appears, stop using it.

Net Vol. 100gm

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Product Name: D-Tan Cleanser

Category: Face & Body Cleanser

Purpose: Helps remove tan, dirt, and dullness

Skin Type: Suitable for all skin types

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
• Cinnamon Oil – Supports deep cleansing and helps refresh tired, dull-looking skin

• Clove Oil – Known for its purifying properties, it helps keep the skin clean and clear

• Camphor Bark Oil – Provides a cooling, soothing effect while helping maintain a fresh feel 

• Vitamin E – Helps keep the skin soft, nourished, and healthy-looking 

• Globulus Leaf Oil – Adds a refreshing touch and supports a clean, revitalized feel

• Aloe Vera – Soothes and hydrates the skin, preventing dryness after cleansing

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
• Removes Tan Build Up – Helps reduce the appearance of sun tan and dullness 

• Deep Cleansing Action – Clears dirt, oil, and daily impurities effectively

• Refreshes Tired Skin – Leaves your skin feeling fresh, clean, and energized

• Soothes & Calms – Helps maintain a cool, comfortable feel on the skin

• Improves Skin Clarity – Supports a clearer and more even-looking complexion

• Controls Excess Oil – Keeps skin balanced without making it dry

• Hydrates While Cleansing – Maintains softness and prevents dryness

• Daily Skin Reset – Gives your skin a clean, refreshed start every day
